summary: Iteration 121: Settings page refactoring into sub-tabs - All frontend UI tests passed. Settings page extracted from App.js (3400+ lines) into separate Settings.jsx component with 5 sub-tabs: Branding, GST, Stock, Messaging, Data. All sub-tabs load correctly, switching works without page reload, Save Branding updates header, other main tabs still functional.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed (pre-existing issue)

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Settings page container [data-testid='settings-page'] renders correctly
VERIFIED: Sub-tabs container [data-testid='settings-sub-tabs'] with all 5 tabs visible
VERIFIED: Branding sub-tab shows company name 'NAVKAR AGRO' and tagline fields with existing data
VERIFIED: GST sub-tab shows CGST/SGST/IGST fields and GST Company Details form
VERIFIED: Stock sub-tab shows Opening Stock form with FY year and Carry Forward button
VERIFIED: Messaging sub-tab shows 'WhatsApp Connected' status and Telegram Bot section
VERIFIED: Data sub-tab shows Health Check button, Backup section with 4/7 backups, Error Log section
VERIFIED: Sub-tab switching works without page reload (no full page refresh)
VERIFIED: Save Branding button works - toast 'Branding update ho gaya!' appeared
VERIFIED: Other main tabs (Entries, Dashboard, Vouchers) still work after Settings refactor
VERIFIED: Settings tab accessible after switching to other tabs and back
VERIFIED: App.js reduced from 3477 to ~2340 lines after Settings extraction
VERIFIED: Settings.jsx is ~1189 lines with well-organized sub-tab components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings page successfully refactored from App.js into Settings.jsx component. 5 sub-tabs: Branding (company name, tagline, custom fields), GST (rates + company details), Stock (opening stock), Messaging (WhatsApp + Telegram), Data (health check, backup, error log). All state management moved to Settings.jsx except branding which updates App.js via onBrandingUpdate callback. Backup reminder dialog still works from App.js. WhatsApp is connected with API key configured.

settings_page_loads.details: Settings page container and sub-tabs container render correctly

branding_subtab.details: Shows company name 'NAVKAR AGRO', tagline, custom fields section, preview, and Save button

gst_subtab.details: Shows CGST/SGST/IGST inputs and GST Company Details form with all fields

stock_subtab.details: Shows Opening Stock section with FY year display and Carry Forward button

messaging_subtab.details: Shows 'WhatsApp Connected' status with API key masked, Telegram Bot section

data_subtab.details: Shows Health Check button, Backup section with 4/7 backups, Error Log section

subtab_switching.details: All 5 sub-tabs switch without page reload

save_branding.details: Save Branding button works - toast 'Branding update ho gaya!' appeared

other_main_tabs.details: Entries, Dashboard, Vouchers tabs still work after Settings refactor

settings_tab_persistence.details: Settings tab works after switching to other tabs and back
